# Azure Hybrid Networking for Sovereign Cloud

[Home](https://www.thomasmaurer.ch/)[Microsoft Azure](https://www.thomasmaurer.ch/category/microsoft/microsoft-azure/)Azure Hybrid Networking for Sovereign Cloud

[Email](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#)

I’m happy to share a new video where I sit down with **Cynthia Treger (EMEA GBB for Networking at Microsoft)** to discuss **Azure Hybrid Networking for Sovereign Cloud scenarios**.

In this conversation, we start with the **Microsoft Global Network** and why it is such a critical foundation for hybrid and sovereign cloud architectures. From there, we explore the different **Azure connectivity options**, including **ExpressRoute**, **Site‑to‑Site VPN/internet-based scenarios**, and regional as well as inter‑regional connectivity considerations.

We also discuss how these networking capabilities enable **secure connectivity for [Azure Local](https://www.thomasmaurer.ch/tag/azure-local/) and [Azure Arc–enabled services](https://www.thomasmaurer.ch/tag/azure-arc/)**, helping organizations operate consistently across cloud, on‑premises, edge, and regulated environments.

If you’re designing or operating a **hybrid or sovereign cloud architecture**, this video provides practical insights into choosing the right networking approach and understanding the trade‑offs involved.

🎥 **Watch the video:**

- [Default outbound access in Azure | Microsoft Learn](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-network/ip-services/default-outbound-access)

- [Arc gateway endpoint list – Azure Arc](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-arc/servers/arc-gateway-endpoints)

### About the Author / [Thomas Maurer](https://www.thomasmaurer.ch/author/d9pe/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2080%2080'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Thomas is the EMEA Global Black Belt (GBB) for Sovereign Cloud at Microsoft, helping organizations across the region harness Microsoft’s sovereign, hybrid, multicloud, and edge solutions. He works directly with C-level leaders and technical teams to remove roadblocks, accelerate digital transformation, and shape long-term cloud strategies that meet business and regulatory needs. With over 15 years of experience in cloud and datacenter, including his previous role as Principal Program Manager and Chief Evangelist for Azure Hybrid, he combines deep technical expertise with a passion for customer success. He specializes in creating scalable architectures, solution accelerators, and thought leadership that drive adoption and innovation on Azure. Thomas is a passionate community advocate and frequently speaks at industry events such as Microsoft Ignite and Microsoft TechDays. He shares his expertise through his Cloud and Datacenter Blog at www.thomasmaurer.ch and on LinkedIn and X.com www.twitter.com/thomasmaurer.
